/home/runner/work/UsrLinuxEmu/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/driver_gpu.dir/link.d -shared  -o driver_gpu.so CMakeFiles/driver_gpu.dir/gpu_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/driver_gpu.dir/address_space.cpp.o CMakeFiles/driver_gpu.dir/buddy_allocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/driver_gpu.dir/ring_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/driver_gpu.dir/plugin_gpu.cpp.o  ../../src/libkernel.a -ldl -lpthread
